description: Job Responsibilities Create and execute test plans (manual & automated) for web/mobile Perform functional, regression, and integration testing Build automation frameworks (Python/Go) and integrate with CI/CD Track defects and document results Reverse engineer apps and validate obfuscation & core logic protection Test app integrity, rooted/jailbroken environments, and anti-tampering defenses Conduct API security testing (auth, access control, anti-replay, MITM) Identify exposed sensitive data/files in production Analyze traffic patterns, TLS fingerprints, and validate obfuscation techniques Engage users to identify issues and real-world use cases Handle bug reports and translate feedback into test improvements Collaborate with teams to prioritize fixes and enhance product quality Job Requirements Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (Diploma with relevant experience considered) 2–3 years of QA or software development experience Strong experience in manual and automated testing Proficiency in Python or Go Experience building automated testing frameworks Solid understanding of OOP, asynchronous programming, and design patterns Customer-facing experience is a plus We’re Looking For Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail Ability to think like an attacker: How can the app be reverse engineered or tampered with? How can APIs be abused? Will the system be flagged or blocked (e.g., DPI/GFW)? Basic knowledge of security testing or reverse engineering is required
